title: The Hope
writer: Henry Hamilton, Albert S. Le Vino, Cecil Raleigh
actors: Jack Mulhall, Marguerite De La Motte, Ruth Stonehouse
plot: Michael Dudley, an English moneylender known as Michael Waltburn, is anxious that his daughter Olive be received in society and so arranges with one of his clients, the Duchess of Remington, to sponsor the girl in return for cance...
